dashboard.emptyHint: Run an agent to see your activity here
list.emptyHint: Add an agent in the <1>agents/</1> directory or import an AFPS package
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete agent "{{name}}"? This will permanently remove it from the organization.
detail.deleteConfirmWithApps: Delete agent "{{name}}"? It is currently installed in: {{apps}}. This will permanently remove it from all applications.
detail.titleMissingSkill: A required skill is not installed
detail.clearRunsConfirm: Delete all runs for this agent? This action is irreversible.
detail.emptyConnectionsHint: This agent doesn't depend on any integration
detail.integrationInactive: Integration not active in this application — activate it to connect.
detail.integrationUpgradeTooltip: Extends your existing connection's permissions without removing it. The IdP will only ask for the additional permissions.
missingConnections.title: Integration connections required
missingConnections.intro: This agent depends on integrations that aren't connected (or are missing permissions). Resolve each one below, then try again.
missingConnections.mustChoose.pickPrompt: Pick the connection to use for this run ({{count}} available):
Pick the connection to use for this run ({{count}} available):
detail.integrationMemberPicker.title: Pick the connection to use for this agent
detail.integrationMemberPicker.missingSc: This connection lacks some permissions the agent requires. Upgrade it to grant the missing ones.
This connection ({{owner}}) lacks some required permissions. Only its owner can re-consent — or pick another connection.
detail.memorySectionPinnedEmpty: No pinned block. Agents add them via `pin({ key, content })`.
detail.memorySectionArchiveEmpty: No archived note. Agents add them via `note(content)`.
detail.memoryEmptyAllHint: The agent will add pinned blocks (`pin`) and notes (`note`) here as it writes them during runs.
detail.memoryHelp: Pinned = injected in every prompt · Archive = retrieved via recall_memory
detail.clearMemoriesConfirm: Delete all memories for this agent? This action is irreversible.
runs.title: All runs
runs.emptyHint: Run an agent to see your runs here
runs.remoteBadgeTitle: This run executed on the caller's host (CLI, GitHub Action, or self-hosted runner) and reported events back via a signed sink.
runs.deletedAgentTitle: The source agent has been deleted. The run is kept for history but cannot be re-run.
run.degradedIntegrations.title: Connection lost during this run
run.degradedIntegrations.message: These integrations returned an authentication error and must be reconnected before the next launch.
run.memoryEmpty: No memory was written or updated during this run
import.title: Import package
import.dropText: Drop an AFPS, AFPS-bundle, or ZIP file here
bundle.requiresVersion: Publish a version of the agent first
import.confirmOverwrite: This package has unarchived changes (active version v{{activeVersion}}). The import will overwrite them.
import.confirmIntegrity: Version {{version}} already exists with different content. The import will replace this version's content.
import.urlLabel: Import a skill from a URL
input.title: {{name}} — Parameters
config.title: Configuration — {{name}}
schedule.name: Name (optional)
schedule.cronHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday
schedule.fileInputBlocked: Scheduling is not available for agents with file inputs
schedule.deleteConfirm: Delete this schedule? This action cannot be undone.
editor.skillsEmpty: No skills in packages. Add some from the Packages page.
editor.integrationsEmpty: No integrations imported. Visit the Integrations marketplace to import one.
editor.runtimeToolsHint: Select the built-in tools the agent can use during its run. Enable Output if the agent returns a result; it is required when an output schema is defined.
editor.promptHint: The prompt is sent as-is to the agent. Inputs, config and the checkpoint are automatically injected in structured sections before the prompt.
version.viewingArchive: You are viewing archived version {{version}}. This version is read-only.
version.mustBeHigher: The manifest version must be higher than the latest published version. Update the version field in the editor.
version.noVersionInManifest: No version set in the manifest. Add a version field in the editor.
version.restoreConfirm: Restore version {{version}}? The current active version will be overwritten.
version.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete version {{version}}? This action cannot be undone.
version.noChanges: No changes since the last version
integrationEditor.source.title: MCP server source
integrationEditor.source.kindDesc: remote = remote HTTP MCP server · local = bundled mcp-server package · none = credential proxy only.
integrationEditor.source.serverNameDesc: References an installed mcp-server package (imported separately).
integrationEditor.source.noneDesc: No MCP server — the integration only exposes the credential-injecting API proxy.
integrationEditor.auths.title: Authentication methods
integrationEditor.auths.empty: No auth declared. Add at least one.
integrationEditor.auths.apiCallDesc: Gives the agent a generic api_call tool that injects this auth's credentials into HTTP calls. Independent of the MCP source.
integrationEditor.auths.authorizedUrisDe: Allowed patterns (* / ** accepted). Enter or comma to add.
integrationEditor.auths.headerValueDesc: Template, e.g. {$credential.api_key}. Empty to skip injection.
integrationEditor.auths.defaultScopesReq: Wildcard tools enabled: declare non-empty default_scopes here, or add a non-OAuth2 auth method (api_key/basic/custom/mtls).
integrationEditor.auths.credentialFields: Expected field names (e.g. api_key). Each becomes a required string property.
integrationEditor.toolsPolicy.title: Tools policy
integrationEditor.toolsPolicy.help: Per-MCP-tool metadata — the OAuth scopes each tool requires, per auth method.
integrationEditor.allowUndeclaredTools.d: Lets an agent opt into every upstream MCP tool via tools: "*". Under OAuth2, the agent's scopes fall back to the selected auth's default_scopes. Non-OAuth2 auths (api_key, basic, custom, mtls) are wildcard-usable by default (no scope mechanism). Enable only when the server's tool surface grows faster than manifest republishes.
integrationEditor.allowUndeclaredTools.r: Requires at least one wildcard-usable auth: non-OAuth2 (api_key/basic/custom/mtls) or OAuth2 with non-empty default_scopes.
integrationEditor.toolsPolicy.requiredSc: Scopes this tool needs, per auth method. Only the auth used at runtime requests them — another auth (e.g. a PAT) can still serve the tool.
integrationEditor.toolsPolicy.noAuths: Declare an auth method first to assign scopes.
fork.title: Fork package
fork.prefix: Your package will be created as
fork.invalidName: Name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
fork.errorCollision: A package with this name already exists
fork.errorNoPublishedVersion: This package has no published version and cannot be forked
ownership.readOnly: Read-only system package. Fork it to customize.
detail.tabConfigurationHint: These settings apply to every run. Override them per-run via the CLI, the API, or a schedule.
run.overrides.configHint: Override fields on top of the default settings. Values identical to the default are not sent.
run.overrides.dependencyHint: For this run, pick each skill's version. "Inherit" keeps the manifest pin; "Draft" runs the skill's working copy.
run.options.title: Run {{name}} with options
schedule.overridesHint: These overrides apply on every execution of this schedule. Leave on "Inherit" to use the agent's default settings.
schedule.actorHint: Runs from this schedule will use this identity's connections and state.
schedule.connectionOverrides.label: Integration connections
schedule.connectionOverrides.hint: Force a specific connection per integration the agent depends on. Leave on "Inherit" to use the default resolution (admin pin → user fallback) at each fire time.
detail.configAlert: Required configuration fields are not filled in.
api.title: Run this agent via API
api.noKeyHint: Create an API key to run this agent programmatically.
api.keyMasked: Full key only visible at creation
api.responseHint: The run is asynchronous. The API returns a run ID immediately.
api.keyCreated: Key injected in the example below. Copy the curl now — the key won't be visible after navigation.
